item.label: Comprehensive implementation docs migration
item.summary: Migrate all docs/implementation content to planning structure with full reference resolution
item.current_understanding: This request is the umbrella intake for migrating the old implementation-document surface into the planning structure with preserved references, archived backup content, and reader-facing entrypoints that point at the canonical planning docs.
open_questions: Which remaining implementation-backup documents are still canonical versus historical only?
Which migration specs, plans, and tasks still need real content instead of placeholder sections?
What exact reader-facing entrypoints still need reference rewrites before the migration can be considered complete?
